auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Browserless API token appended as the token query parameter. Create or copy it from the Browserless dashboard and REST API quickstart: https://docs.browserless.io/rest-apis/intro.

actions.name: fetch_content
actions.description: Fetch fully rendered HTML content from Browserless.

url.description: The public URL Browserless should navigate to.

html.description: The inline HTML Browserless should render instead of navigating to a URL.

bestAttempt.description: Whether Browserless should continue when asynchronous wait steps fail or time out.

timeout.description: The maximum navigation time in milliseconds.

waitUntil.description: When Browserless should consider navigation successful.

gotoOptions.description: Navigation options forwarded to Browserless gotoOptions.

event.description: The page event name Browserless should wait for.

timeout.description: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the event.

waitForTimeout.description: The fixed time in milliseconds Browserless should wait before returning.

selector.description: The CSS selector Browserless should wait for.

timeout.description: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the selector.

visible.description: Whether the selector must become visible before continuing.

hidden.description: Whether the selector must become hidden before continuing.

items.description: One Browserless resource type to block.

rejectResourceTypes.description: The browser resource types Browserless should block during navigation.

items.description: One request URL pattern to block.

rejectRequestPattern.description: The request URL patterns Browserless should block during navigation.

url.description: The absolute URL of the external script or stylesheet to inject.

content.description: The inline script or stylesheet content to inject.

items.description: One Browserless script or style tag injection entry.

addScriptTag.description: The scripts Browserless should inject before producing the final output.

url.description: The absolute URL of the external script or stylesheet to inject.

content.description: The inline script or stylesheet content to inject.

items.description: One Browserless script or style tag injection entry.

addStyleTag.description: The stylesheets Browserless should inject before producing the final output.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching rendered HTML content with Browserless.

html.description: The fully rendered HTML content returned by Browserless.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a Browserless rendered HTML response.

actions.name: generate_pdf
actions.description: Generate a Browserless PDF file and store it in local transit storage.

url.description: The public URL Browserless should render into a PDF.

html.description: The inline HTML Browserless should render into a PDF.

format.description: The paper format Browserless should use.

printBackground.description: Whether Browserless should print CSS backgrounds.

displayHeaderFooter.description: Whether Browserless should include header and footer templates.

options.description: The PDF options forwarded to Browserless.

bestAttempt.description: Whether Browserless should continue when asynchronous wait steps fail or time out.

timeout.description: The maximum navigation time in milliseconds.

waitUntil.description: When Browserless should consider navigation successful.

gotoOptions.description: Navigation options forwarded to Browserless gotoOptions.

event.description: The page event name Browserless should wait for.

timeout.description: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the event.

waitForTimeout.description: The fixed time in milliseconds Browserless should wait before returning.

selector.description: The CSS selector Browserless should wait for.

timeout.description: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the selector.

visible.description: Whether the selector must become visible before continuing.

hidden.description: Whether the selector must become hidden before continuing.

items.description: One Browserless resource type to block.

rejectResourceTypes.description: The browser resource types Browserless should block during navigation.

items.description: One request URL pattern to block.

rejectRequestPattern.description: The request URL patterns Browserless should block during navigation.

url.description: The absolute URL of the external script or stylesheet to inject.

content.description: The inline script or stylesheet content to inject.

items.description: One Browserless script or style tag injection entry.

addScriptTag.description: The scripts Browserless should inject before producing the final output.

url.description: The absolute URL of the external script or stylesheet to inject.

content.description: The inline script or stylesheet content to inject.

items.description: One Browserless script or style tag injection entry.

addStyleTag.description: The stylesheets Browserless should inject before producing the final output.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for generating a PDF with Browserless.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the generated file.

sizeBytes.description: The generated file size in bytes.

file.description: A Browserless-generated file stored in local transit storage.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a Browserless-generated file.

actions.name: take_screenshot
actions.description: Generate a Browserless screenshot and store it in local transit storage.

url.description: The public URL Browserless should capture.

html.description: The inline HTML Browserless should capture instead of navigating to a URL.

fullPage.description: Whether Browserless should capture the full scrollable page.

quality.description: The output image quality from 0 to 100.

omitBackground.description: Whether Browserless should omit the page background.

x.description: The X coordinate in CSS pixels.

y.description: The Y coordinate in CSS pixels.

width.description: The clip width in CSS pixels.

height.description: The clip height in CSS pixels.

clip.description: The clipping rectangle for the captured screenshot.

options.description: The screenshot options forwarded to Browserless.

bestAttempt.description: Whether Browserless should continue when asynchronous wait steps fail or time out.

timeout.description: The maximum navigation time in milliseconds.

waitUntil.description: When Browserless should consider navigation successful.

gotoOptions.description: Navigation options forwarded to Browserless gotoOptions.

event.description: The page event name Browserless should wait for.

timeout.description: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the event.

waitForTimeout.description: The fixed time in milliseconds Browserless should wait before returning.

selector.description: The CSS selector Browserless should wait for.

timeout.description: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the selector.

visible.description: Whether the selector must become visible before continuing.

hidden.description: Whether the selector must become hidden before continuing.

items.description: One Browserless resource type to block.

rejectResourceTypes.description: The browser resource types Browserless should block during navigation.

items.description: One request URL pattern to block.

rejectRequestPattern.description: The request URL patterns Browserless should block during navigation.

content.description: The inline script or stylesheet content to inject.
